input.tenant_message: The range hood above the stove stopped working — the fan doesn't run and the light bulb inside is also out. When I cook anything the kitchen fills up with smoke and grease smell and it just hangs in the air. I've checked and the hood is plugged in but nothing happens when I press any of the buttons. It's been this way for about two weeks.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a technician to inspect the range hood fan motor, control board, and internal wiring. If the unit is old or the motor is seized, replacement may be more cost-effective than repair. Also replace the light bulb if it is not an integrated LED module.
